title: Senior Teacher - MT Educare - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - MT Educare - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About MT Educare:
MT Educare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare!
